title: Why does my jaw clench every time I visit my childhood home?
description: It's like my body remembers something I've decided to forget.

title: Am I mourning a breakup or just mourning the version of me that existed with him?
description: I don't miss him, but I feel so empty.

title: Why do I feel profound guilt whenever I prioritize rest?
description: I feel like I'm wasting time if I'm not producing something.

title: Is it normal to feel totally disconnected from my physical body during intimacy?
description: It feels like watching a movie of myself.

title: How do you break a generational cycle of silence?
description: No one in my family talks about the pain. I want to be the one who stops it.

title: Why do I sabotage relationships right when they become safe?
description: Safety feels boring, or maybe terrifying.

title: Is my chronic skin breakout tied to my anxiety?
description: Every time I have a deadline, my face erupts.

title: How do I know if I'm ambitious or just running away from poverty trauma?
description: I can't stop working, but I don't feel fulfilled.

title: Why do I feel more loyalty to my mother's pain than my own happiness?
description: If I am happy, I feel like I'm abandoning her.

title: Can your body reject a partner before your mind does?
description: I physically recoil when he touches me now.
